response: This code implements the **fixup procedure for Red-Black Tree insertion**, ensuring the tree maintains its balancing properties after inserting a new node. It handles three cases: (1) if the uncle is red, it recolors nodes and moves up the tree; (2) if the uncle is black and the node is a right child, it performs a left rotation; (3) otherwise, it recolors and performs a right rotation. The root is always set to black at the end to preserve the Red-Black Tree invariants.
